title: misch origins, Cat Witch
description: She's the sweetest, the sweetest in the world
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack

, choose to spawn as the Cat Witch

, master of all cats, overloaded with cuteness, don't forget to share !

_, dont forget to download the resourcepack and pehkui as a required mod_

![Cat Witch Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d22ce03bbbeb73def7dd2e26b5ec8b0c0464168_0.webp)

![Cat Witch GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eda4f631a68984f4905af50241febbdde24d7e9.png)

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

# notes
, cat keychains come in black, white, orange, and silver ! these spawn tamed cats

, all players can craft their own Cat Keychains ! ask the Cat Witch to have them enchanted

, the Ribbon item is exclusive to the Cat Witch, but they can craft it and give them to others

, only 1 Cat Witch per world please !

![Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb5c2d044247d90b21998cff0ce89ecbd4500f6.png)
